I'm excited that we have a partner.” ![Michael Hussey](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/testimonies/michael.webp) Michael Hussey Founder and President of StatSocial ![ADP](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/clients/adp.svg) ![Box](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/clients/box.svg) ![Maricopa](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/clients/maricopa.svg) ![Hypercontext](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/clients/hypercontext.svg) ![Swell](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/clients/swell.svg) ![CountingWorks](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/clients/cw.svg) ![US Ski & Snowboard](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/clients/usski.svg) ![ClearChecks](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/clients/clearchecks.svg) ![SoStocked](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/clients/sostocked.svg) ![eLuma](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/clients/eluma.svg) ![Waves](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/waves.svg) Need top notch developers? You’re in the right place. DevSquad helps entrepreneurs build and launch new products and helps growing companies plug in a ready-to-go dev team and start building. ![Product and Design](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/homepage/product_and_design.png) Building a new product? We’ll help you release the smallest product with the biggest value. We specialize in: [ ![MVP Development](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/homepage/mvp-development.svg) MVP Development ](https://devsquad.com/mvp-development) [ ![SaaS Development](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/homepage/saas-development.svg) SaaS Development ](https://devsquad.com/saas-development) [ ![Design Sprint](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/homepage/design-sprint.svg) Design Sprint ](https://devsquad.com/design-sprint) [ ![Web App Development](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/homepage/web-app-development.svg) Web App Development ](https://devsquad.com/web-app-development) [ ![Mobile App Development](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/homepage/mobile-app-development.svg) Mobile App Development ](https://devsquad.com/mobile-app-development) ![Dashboard](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/homepage/engine_with_dash.png) Behind on hiring? We’ll take the load off your team so you can keep growing right away. We are experts in: [ ![Laravel](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/homepage/laravel.svg) Laravel ](https://devsquad.com/hire-laravel-developers) [ ![Vue.js](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/homepage/vue.svg) Vue.js ](https://devsquad.com/vuejs-developers) [ ![Node.js](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/homepage/node.svg) Node.js ](https://devsquad.com/nodejs-development) [ ![React](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/homepage/react.svg) React ](https://devsquad.com/react-development) [ ![React Native](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/homepage/react-native.svg) React Native ](https://devsquad.com/react-native-development) [ ![Electron](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/homepage/electron.svg) Electron ](https://devsquad.com/electron-development) Talent is the difference between good and great products Get elite software developers on demand — plus every resource your squad needs to make your product successful. ![Developers](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/team-structure/developers.svg) 2-6 Full Stack Developers with 4+ years experience, working exclusively on your product. ![Technical Product Managers](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/team-structure/technical-product-managers.svg) A Product Manager who keeps development work on track with your vision and timeline. ![UX Designers](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/team-structure/ux-designers.svg) A UX/UI Designer who keeps your product looking great and user-friendly. ![VP Team](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/team-structure/vp-team.svg) A VP team so your PM and dedicated devs get the support they need. ![QA Analysts](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/team-structure/qa-managers.svg) A QA Team who does manual and automated testing for continuous quality. ![DevOps Engineers](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/team-structure/devops-engineers.svg) A DevOps Team who manages infrastructure scalability and security. When you work with DevSquad… You don’t only have the 2–6 developers working on your squad. You also have every single resource your squad needs to make your product successful. We support our teams at every step, so you have a winning process without making a dozen new hires. ![Hexagon](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/homepage/hexagon.svg) Breathe easy With our plug-and-play development process ![Asterisc](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/homepage/asterisc.svg) Pay as you go Monthly subscription based on how many developers you need ![Hourglasss](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/homepage/hourglass.svg) Build smarter We help tighten features based on the product’s business value ![double quotes](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/double-quotes-white.svg) * “I had attempted to save money by managing programmers myself. There was one project that took two years to complete. By the end of it, it still broke all the time, had tons of bugs and was just not usable. I got in touch with DevSquad and they built a better product in three months with no bugs and it is a much better piece of software. It cost about 1/5 of what I paid when I was trying to manage it myself.” * * * ![Michael Spencer](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/testimonies/michael-b2b.webp) Michael Spencer CEO, Signly Plug in DevSquad We’ve refined our process from product prototyping to continuous quality. Get a new product that works reliably so you can bring it to market quickly and with confidence. Or add a DevSquad to your distributed team to help lighten your load for an important feature add-on, API product or internal project. [ Get Started ](https://devsquad.com/contact) ![Plugin](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/homepage/plugin.svg) ![Ball](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/ball.svg) ![Image](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/homepage/setup.svg) Fully managed process Product management, quality assurance, DevOps: it’s all expertly covered. ![Image](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/homepage/team.svg) World-class team structure We model our team structure after top companies and our own successful exit. ![Image](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/homepage/time-and-cost.svg) Build now, no hiring Assembling a team that works together effectively takes time that you don’t have. What makes DevSquad so different? Fully-managed high-performing dev teams. Monthly subscription. Top talent. Integrity. 1 ### Our winning process We have a winning process based on how the world’s smartest product teams are run. This takes the hassle of management off your shoulders while simultaneously making us faster (and therefore more affordable) than any other software development shop you’ve encountered. 2 ### We meet client goals We build SaaS products, mobile apps, web apps, internal-use platforms and more. With any product, our number one goal is to help our clients meet their own business goals and to satisfy their customer’s demands. We know that when we do our best work, we’re rewarded with repeat business and referrals. We understand that without management and aligned business strategy, developers can’t meet goals or demands. We know how to manage high performing dev teams and we do it 3 ### Our experience We’ve been in business since 2014. The majority of our business today comes from repeat clients building new products, and from referrals. Our commitment to building only what needs to be built — and doing so with complete skill and professionalism — keeps our clients. ![User setup](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/homepage/user-setup.png) You’re going to love your DevSquad Including the people behind the scenes. ![timeline](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/homepage/timeline.svg) ![Bullet](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/homepage/bullet.svg) Tell us about your product ![Bullet](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/homepage/bullet.svg) Kick things off with a prototype ![Bullet](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/homepage/bullet.svg) Make changes before we build ![Bullet](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/homepage/bullet.svg) Get the exact product your users need ![ball white](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/ball-white.svg) ![waves white](https://devsquad.com/assets/site/waves-white.svg) Work with the customer-centric team that delivers Invaluable agile team management experience. Simplified monthly cost.
